title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE UNION NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ” ULIP ANNEX IN BARANGAY UPPER ULIP, MUNICIPALITY OF MONKAYO, PROVINCE OF COMPOSTELA VALLEY FROM THE UNION NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO E KNOWN AS ULIP NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 4820; 106 OG No. 16, 2311 (April 19, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9976, February 10, 2010 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE UNION NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ” ULIP ANNEX IN BARANGAY UPPER ULIP, MUNICIPALITY OF MONKAYO, PROVINCE OF COMPOSTELA VALLEY FROM THE UNION NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO E KNOWN AS ULIP NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

ГўВЂВ” The Union National High School ГўВЂВ” Ulip Annex in Barangay Upper Ulip, Municipality of Monkayo, Province of Compostela Valley is hereby separated from the Union National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Ulip National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transferr of Assets and Liabilities.

ГўВЂВ” All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Union National High School ГўВЂВ” Ulip Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Ulip National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

ГўВЂВ” The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Ulip National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriations of the Union National High School ГўВЂВ” Ulip Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

ГўВЂВ” The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

ГўВЂВ” this Act shall take effect fifteen (15) after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 2, 2008 and October 5, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: FEB 10 2010

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
